sisu_0.fanout_policy: prefix_equivalent_batched_trials; Feedbax task API does not expose a stable hidden-state resume hook, so every perturbation row shares the same deterministic wash-in prefix and zero-noise inputs inside the same materialization pass.

sisu_1.fanout_policy: prefix_equivalent_batched_trials; Feedbax task API does not expose a stable hidden-state resume hook, so every perturbation row shares the same deterministic wash-in prefix and zero-noise inputs inside the same materialization pass.

title: Undelayed target-fix SISU effective 020a65b PGD-radius row

washin_contract.delayed_go_cue: go cue off for 10 steps, then on; target visible throughout.
washin_contract.fanout_policy: prefix_equivalent_batched_trials because the current Feedbax eval API does not expose a supported hidden-state resume hook.
washin_contract.initial_mechanics: mechanics.vector is zeroed, then every 8D current/delayed mechanics block receives target x/y position with zero velocity, force/filter, and integrator state.
washin_contract.noise: epsilon inputs are zeroed before evaluation.
